source: contract Vault { mapping(address => uint256) public balanceOf; function withdraw(uint256 amount) external { require(balanceOf[msg.sender] >= amount); (bool ok,) = msg.sender.call{value: amount}(""); require(ok); balanceOf[msg.sender] -= amount; } }
contract Token { mapping(address => uint256) public balanceOf; function mint(address to, uint256 amount) external { balanceOf[to] += amount; } }
